policy: Country panels must use official police, court, justice-ministry, statistics-office, parliamentary, or reputable public-data sources. Do not treat nationality as immigration status. Separate suspects, charges, convictions, victims, asylum status, foreign-born status, nationality, unknown status, and per-capita rates. If official migrant-status data is unavailable, show EST. SOURCE-SPLIT rather than inventing a number.

countries.description: Track sexual offences where official records identify suspect nationality, immigration status, asylum status, conviction status, or foreign-born status. Separate police reports from convictions.
countries.sourceLabel: ONS / Home Office / MoJ / police force data / courts

countries.description: Track official sexual-offence datasets, suspect nationality where published, court outcomes, residence-status data if available, and unknown-status cases. Do not infer immigration status from nationality alone.
countries.sourceLabel: SSMSI / Ministry of Interior / Justice Ministry / courts

countries.description: Track police crime statistics by suspect nationality, asylum-seeker/refugee categories where published, convictions, victims, and per-capita context. Separate Tatverdächtige from convictions.
countries.sourceLabel: BKA PKS / Federal Interior Ministry / courts

countries.description: Track sexual-offence data, suspect origin/status where official sources publish it, conviction data, victimisation surveys, and unknown-status warnings.
Track sexual-violence reports, suspect nationality/status where available, conviction data, irregular-migration category if officially measured, and per-capita warnings.
countries.sourceLabel: ISTAT / Interior Ministry / Justice Ministry / courts

countries.description: Track sexual-offence reports, suspect nationality where published, residence/immigration-status data where official, court outcomes, and unknown-status cases.
countries.sourceLabel: INE / Interior Ministry / judiciary / police datasets

countries.description: Track sexual-offence reports, suspect migration-background categories where official, nationality/status separation, convictions, and per-capita context.
Track official sexual-offence reports, suspect nationality/status where available, prosecution/conviction outcomes, and unknown-status limits.
Track sexual-offence statistics, suspect nationality, asylum/refugee categories where official, convictions, and per-capita context.
countries.sourceLabel: BMI crime statistics / courts / statistics office

countries.description: Track sexual-assault arrest/conviction data only where immigration status is officially recorded. Separate undocumented status, foreign-born status, nationality, citizenship, and unknown status.
countries.sourceLabel: FBI NIBRS / BJS / DHS / state courts
